3272860.name: DuckLaserDuck
3272860.description:
Welcome to DuckLaserDuck. You just have to kill the bugs and critters before they kill you, so you can kill the bugs EVEN BETTER. Defeat the 3 floors and their 3 bosses to win the game!

DuckLaserDuck is a randomly generated action RPG shooter with heavy roguelike and bullet-hell elements.

You'll exterminate the pests while dodging their bullets. And there are HATS, which just look pretty cool. But it's not all fun in the sun. Dying sucks and health is pretty rare, so don't take damage. There are difficult bosses that want to stop you from becoming stronger. Luckily, you can get stronger by harnessing the magical powers of over 75 unique items. You can use these items to create diverse and creative solutions to kill the bugs. Eat that yummy dopamine when you finally get the key piece of your combo and beat the 3rd boss with your UPGRADES.

Everything with the 

Key features:

  • Randomly generated dungeons (each room is selected from numerous hand-crafted rooms), items enemies and bosses, you never play the same game twice.

  • Over 75 unique items that give you powers with banger synergies.

  • 4 unique starting weapons

  • 8 enemy types*

  • 2 bosses*

  • 1 full floor, spanning for 10 rooms*

  • 11 unique hats to unlock and wear

*Early Access features that are planned to be improved, but without guarantee.
3272860.supported_languages: 英语, 法语, 意大利语, 德语, 西班牙语 - 西班牙, 印度尼西亚语, 日语, 韩语, 葡萄牙语 - 葡萄牙, 俄语, 简体中文
